title: High-Performance Protocol for ONT Library Preparation
author: Lukas Žemaitis

steps.title: Transfer 250 fmol of the dsDNA to a clean 0
steps.instruction: Transfer 250 fmol of the dsDNA to a clean 0.2 mL PCR tube, adjusting the volume based on DNA concentration.

steps.title: Add the following components sequentially, mixing...
steps.instruction: Add the following components sequentially, mixing by pipetting approximately 10 times after each addition: %s %s

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge the tube and place...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge the tube and place it into a thermal cycler with a heated lid.

steps.title: Run the following thermal cycling program
steps.instruction: Run the following thermal cycling program: 20 °C for 00:05:00 . 65 °C for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: After incubation, transfer the reaction mixture to a 1
steps.instruction: After incubation, transfer the reaction mixture to a 1.5 mL RNase- and DNase-free low-bind tube.

steps.title: Add the following components in the...
steps.instruction: Add the following components in the specified order, mixing by pipetting approximately 10 times after each addition: A B 1 Component Volume 2 End-prepped DNA 60 µL 3 Ligation Buffer (LNB, ONT) 25 µL 4 Quick T4 DNA Ligase (E6056S, NEB) 10 µL 5 Ligation Adapters (LA, ONT) 5 µL 6 Total volume 100 µL

steps.title: Incubate the reaction at Room temperature for 00:20:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the reaction at Room temperature for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Add AMPure XP Beads (AXP, ONT)...
steps.instruction: Add AMPure XP Beads (AXP, ONT) to the reaction tube based on the DNA length: 180 µL for fragments < 100 bp. 50 µL for fragments > 100 bp.

steps.title: Mix by inverting the tube for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Mix by inverting the tube for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge the tube, then place...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge the tube, then place it on a magnetic rack for 00:03:00 to pellet the beads.

steps.title: While keeping the tube on the...
steps.instruction: While keeping the tube on the magnet, carefully remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 250 µL of Small Fragment...
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL of Small Fragment Buffer (SFB, ONT) to the tube.

steps.title: Remove the tube from the magnet...
steps.instruction: Remove the tube from the magnet and gently rotate for at least 00:03:00 , occasionally flicking to ensure even bead distribution.

steps.title: Briefly centrifuge the tube and place...
steps.instruction: Briefly centrifuge the tube and place it back on the magnet for 00:03:00 , then remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat the wash step with 250...
steps.instruction: Repeat the wash step with 250 µL of SFB following the same procedure.

steps.title: After the final wash, briefly centrifuge...
steps.instruction: After the final wash, briefly centrifuge the tube, then place it on the magnet to remove any remaining supernatant.

steps.title: Allow the bead pellet to dry...
steps.instruction: Allow the bead pellet to dry for 00:01:00 before removing the tube from the magnet.

steps.title: Add 12 µL of Elution Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 12 µL of Elution Buffer (EB, ONT) to the tube and mix thoroughly by pipetting.

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: Place the tube back on the...
steps.instruction: Place the tube back on the magnet for 00:03:00 to pellet the beads.

steps.title: Transfer the supernatant containing the prepared...
steps.instruction: Transfer the supernatant containing the prepared library to a new 1.5 mL RNase- and DNase-free tube and place On ice .

steps.title: Measure DNA concentration using the Qubit...
steps.instruction: Measure DNA concentration using the Qubit HS dsDNA kit (Thermo Fisher Scientific).

steps.title: Insert a Flongle (ONT) flow cell...
steps.instruction: Insert a Flongle (ONT) flow cell into a MinION Mk1B device (ONT).

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00 before initiating sequencing run
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00 before initiating sequencing run.

steps.title: Perform a quality check using MinKNOW software
steps.instruction: Perform a quality check using MinKNOW software.

steps.title: Select only flow cells with ≥...
steps.instruction: Select only flow cells with ≥ 50 active pores for sequencing.

steps.title: Prepare the flow cell priming mix...
steps.instruction: Prepare the flow cell priming mix by combining the following components in a 1.5 mL tube, then immediately place On ice : %s %s

steps.title: Peel back the seal tab of...
steps.instruction: Peel back the seal tab of the Flongle flow cell to expose the sample port.

steps.title: Secure the seal tab by adhering...
steps.instruction: Secure the seal tab by adhering it to the MinION lid using its adhesive strip.

steps.title: Carefully load the priming mix into...
steps.instruction: Carefully load the priming mix into the flow cell, ensuring no air bubbles are introduced.

steps.title: Incubate the flow cell for 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate the flow cell for 00:05:00 .

steps.title: During the incubation period, prepare the...
steps.instruction: During the incubation period, prepare the sequencing mix by combining the following components: %s %s
